subject: Re: MCore crashing at --iter 0
body:
Hi Hamid,
cuFFT internal error is likely out of memory…
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Jun 3, 2025, at 19:26, Hamidreza Rahmani <hamid13r@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿
1d
Hi all,
I am trying Warp2.0 and following the instructions from 
Warp
Quick Start: Tilt Series - Warp, M and friends
Everything is working great and I can extract particles either from Warp or pyTOM template-matching and reaching 8A using relion 5.
I have no problem running 
Mtools create_population
, 
MTools create_source
, and 
MTools create_species
.
But when I run
 MCore --population m_refinement/pytom_clean_cls2.population --iter 0
I get this error:
Creating directories... Done
Spawning workers... Done
Preparing for refinement – this will take a few minutes per species
Preparing refinement requisites...
1/1
Performing refinement
bash: line 1: 793093 Killed                  /home/janlevinson/micromamba/envs/warp/bin/WarpWorker -d 0 -p 0 --pipe /tmp/WarpWorkerPipe_1_793075_548019137 -s > worker0.out 2> worker0.err
Preparing population for data source HRR036...Done
Loading gain reference for HRR036... Done
Refining all series in data source...
0/9Unhandled exception. System.NotImplementedException: The method or operation is not implemented.
   at MCore.MCore.WorkerDied(Object sender, EventArgs e) in /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1723683627331/work/MCore/MCore.cs:line 597
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.ReportDeath() in /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1723683627331/work/WarpLib/WorkerWrapper.cs:line 255
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.<StartHeartbeat>b__14_0() in /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1723683627331/work/WarpLib/WorkerWrapper.cs:line 189
bash: line 1: 793187 Aborted                 (core dumped) /home/janlevinson/micromamba/envs/warp/bin/WarpWorker -d 0 -p 0 --pipe /tmp/WarpWorkerPipe_2_793075_287069214 -s > worker0.out 2> worker0.err

I trying the debug mode and 
--perdevice_preprocess 1 --perdevice_refine 1 --perdevice_postprocess 1
 just in case it is a GPU problem I get a 
worker0.out
 that is empty and a 
worker0.err
 that has
terminate called after throwing an instance of 
'std::runtime_error'

  what():  cuFFT 
error:
 CUFFT_INTERNAL_ERROR at 
/usr/
share
/miniconda/
envs
/package-build/
conda-bld
/warp_1723683627331/
work
/NativeAcceleration/
gtom
/src/
FFT/FFT.
cu:
23


Any ideas what is happening? I didn’t face this problem when I was testing 1 tomogram but I am not sure if that is relevant.
Best,
Hamid




--
